title: Creating public APIs is sensitive
description: This rule flags classes that expose public methods or classes that expose public attributes, indicating that they are intended for use as a public API.
message: Public API creation without proper security measures may expose sensitive data or functionality.
recommendation: Consider moving the exposed API to a separate module or ensuring it is secured with proper authentication and authorization.

noncompliant.description: Exposes sensitive data through a public method

compliant.description: Uses authentication before exposing sensitive data

why_is_this_an_issue: Public APIs expose sensitive functionality and data, making them targets for attacks.
how_to_fix: Ensure APIs are properly secured with authentication and authorization.
